mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, description, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_category WHERE name = #{name} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_knowledge_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_knowledge_category (parent_id, name, description, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_knowledge_category SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_knowledge_category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
